title: CDF Runtime Manifest
description: Manifest for a CDF runtime configuration package. Placed at the config instance root directory (e.g. src/tsdc/01/cdf-runtime.json).

release.description: Semantic version for the release lifecycle of this config package.

description.description: Human-readable description of the config instance.

templates.description: Template dependencies keyed by '<scope>/<name>/<version>'. Values are semver ranges (e.g. '^2.1.0').
